headline: How Investors Are Reacting To WEC Energy Group (WEC) Plan To Eliminate Supermajority Voting Thresholds
summary: In March 2026, WEC Energy Group, Inc. proposed amendments to its Restated Articles of Incorporation and Bylaws to eliminate supermajority voting requirements, ahead of a shareholder vote at its May 7, 2026 annual meeting. This move could meaningfully expand shareholder influence over key corporate decisions, aligning WEC’s governance with evolving investor expectations for simpler majority voting standards. Next, we’ll examine how WEC’s planned removal of supermajority voting thresholds may...
